metadata.name: Question About a Specific Tuition Fee

description: A student is inquiring about a 'Student Activity Fee' listed on their tuition bill.

nodes.task_description: Identify the student and view their itemized tuition bill.

expected_outcome.value: Agent locates the 'Student Activity Fee' on the bill.

nodes.task_description: Look up the definition and purpose of the fee in the university's fee schedule documentation.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds the fee supports student clubs, events, and government.

nodes.task_description: Clearly explain the purpose of the fee to the student.

expected_outcome.value: Agent provides a clear and concise explanation.
